name: Chocolate Orange Supreme Cheesecake-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C).
2. Mix the crumbs, cinnamon, and melted butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Increase the oven temperature to 350°F (175°C). Beat the cream cheese and sugar together until well blended. Add the eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition. Stir in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
4. Divide the batter into two equal parts. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler and fold it into one part. Mix the Grand Marnier and orange peel into the remaining part.
5. Pour the chocolate batter over the crust and bake for 30 minutes.
6. Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F (160°C). Carefully pour the orange batter over the chocolate layer. Continue baking for another 40 minutes.
7. Turn off the oven and open the oven door slightly. Remove the cheesecake when it has cooled completely. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan.
